title: Electric Current, Resistance, and Ohm's Law

semantic_layer.text: Electric Current, Resistance, and Ohm's Law
Electric current is the rate at which charge flows through a surface.

semantic_layer.spoken_math_alternative: I equals Q divided by delta t.

semantic_layer.figure_alternative: A circuit wire carrying electric current.
semantic_layer.detailed_figure_description: A wire passes through a surface. Positive charge moves along the wire in the direction of conventional current.
